meta.purpose: Encode expert judgment for using GSAP as a production animation engine, including timelines, ScrollTrigger, React integration, plugin choice, and performance tradeoffs.
meta.load_condition: Load when the task involves GSAP implementation, timeline architecture, ScrollTrigger, or when the user is working within a React/Vue/Svelte context using GSAP.

axioms.statement: Use timelines to express choreography, not scattered one-off tweens.
axioms.why: Timelines preserve sequence, reversibility, maintainability, and reviewability.

axioms.statement: Framework integrations must clean up animations according to component lifecycle.
axioms.why: Leaked animations cause duplicated effects and broken state after navigation.

axioms.statement: ScrollTrigger should guide reading, not hijack it.
axioms.why: Scroll-driven motion can easily make content feel trapped or gimmicky.

axioms.statement: A dropped frame destroys premium perception.
axioms.why: Smoothness is part of visual quality, not an implementation detail.

ontology.name: timeline
ontology.definition: A structured animation sequence with coordinated tweens and labels.

ontology.name: ScrollTrigger
ontology.definition: A scroll-linked trigger system for controlling animation progress or timing.

ontology.name: stagger
ontology.definition: A controlled offset across similar elements to create rhythm and hierarchy.

ontology.name: cleanup
ontology.definition: Removing or reverting animation side effects when a component unmounts or re-renders.

frameworks.name: GSAP decision ladder
steps: is scroll or SVG/plugin behavior required?

core_structure.input: brief, audience, surface, constraints, brand tone, implementation environment
core_structure.judgment: attention path, timing, hierarchy, motion grammar, technical feasibility, review criteria
core_structure.output: motion direction, implementation guidance, critique, and measurable acceptance criteria

stances.stance: Prefer timeline-based architecture for anything beyond simple hover states.
Do not use scroll animation when it reduces reading comfort.
